'''鈭歯g-th-zh-k''' ('''kangathzhekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imburse|imburse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imburse|imburse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-th-zh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangathzhekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingathzhekoko|thingathzhekoko]] || [[word:jingathzhekoko|jingathzhekoko]] || [[word:shingathzhekoko|shingathzhekoko]] || [[word:kingathzhekoko|kingathzhekoko]]
